channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: College Football Stock Watch: Why USC is Heading in Right Direction, and Alabama Isn't
item.description: FOX Sports' Joel Klatt explains which teams are trending up and which are trending down as we enter the offseason.

item.title: USA Midfielder Weston McKennie Reportedly Wants Salary Doubled To Stay At Juventus
item.description: Though Weston Mckinnie, a catalyst of the Juventus midfield, transformed his season, his future hangs by a thread.

item.title: Get to Know a College Basketball Mid-Major: Big South
item.description: A look at who's who and what they are playing for in the men's and women's college basketball mid-major Big South.

item.title: Raphinha Set For Barcelona Return As Rashford Remains Out With Knee Injury
item.description: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick gets a large boost for Monday evening's La Liga clash against Girona at Montilivi.

item.title: MLB Spring Training Buzz: Angels' Mike Trout Wants To Return to Center Field
item.description: It's time to dust off those ball bags â MLB spring training has commenced!

item.title: U.S. women blank Sweden, roll into hockey final
item.description: The Americans continued their dominant run through the women's hockey tournament, routing Sweden 5-0 to reach the gold medal game. The U.S. team has o...

item.title: Men's AP Top 25 poll reaction: Michigan is the new No. 1
item.description: After nine straight weeks at the top, the Wildcats fall after back-to-back losses, making way for the Wolverines.

item.title: Women's AP Top 25 poll reaction: Duke into top 10, Georgia and Minnesota debut
item.description: The top five stayed the same, Duke entered the top 10, and Maryland and TCU were the biggest climbers.

item.title: The top 10 women's college basketball games left in the regular season
item.description: Regular-season titles, conference tournament seeds and NCAA tournament hopes are on the line.

item.title: Star WR Hill released as Dolphins clean house
item.description: The Dolphins released Tyreek Hill in a flurry of roster moves that will clear significant salary cap space.
